title: Add notification_service.get_unread_count unit test
description: Add test_get_unread_count to tests/unit/test_notification_service.py. Calls notification_service.send_notification to create 3 notifications for a user, then calls get_unread_count(user_id) and asserts it returns 3. Then calls mark_as_read on one and asserts count decreases to 2.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_notification_service.py -v -k get_unread_count passes; assert notification_service.get_unread_count(user_id) == 3 after 3 sends.
obsolete_reason: deferred while DB migration is in flight; will revisit after Task 1+
